data.title: Altcoin Season Index Indicates Shift in Cryptocurrency Market
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the Altcoin Season Index, as reported by Coinmarketcap, currently stands at 30, up from 28 the previous day. This index suggests that in the past 90 days, approximately 30 out of the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization have outperformed Bitcoin.

The CMC Altcoin Season Index is a real-time indicator used to assess whether the cryptocurrency market is currently in a phase dominated by altcoins. It is based on the performance of the top 100 altcoins relative to Bitcoin over the past 90 days.

data.title: The Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) has warned that unregulated stablecoins pose a systemic risk.
data.description: The Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) stated that only fully regulated, reserve-backed stablecoins can be used as settlement assets. Unregulated stablecoins have inconsistent track records in maintaining their peg. Furthermore, Singapore is preparing legislation to expand its central bank digital currency pilot program. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Top Gainers: Particle Network, AB, and Alchemix Lead Market Amid DeFi Rotation
data.description:
While major cryptocurrencies face renewed volatility, a trio of mid-cap tokens, Particle Network (PARTI), AB, and Alchemix (ALCX), are bucking the trend with strong double-digit gains. Each project is riding unique catalysts ranging from exchange listings to DeFi integrations, reflecting how capital is rotating toward utility-driven blockchain infrastructure.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/top-gainers-particle-network-ab-and-alchemix-lead-market-amid-defi-rotation/

data.title: The First Spot ETF on XRP in the US Is imminent, but the Price Falls Early
data.description:
The price of XRP falls 7 per cent on the eve of the launch of the first US spot ETF managed by Canary Capital, as traders weigh hype, deleveraging and the risk of the classic 'sell the news'.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/xrp/the-first-spot-etf-on-xrp-in-the-us-is-imminent-but-the-price-falls-early/

data.title: Bitfarms released its Q3 financial report: it currently holds 1,827 BTC, with total liquidity reaching $814 million.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Bitfarms released its Q3 2025 financial report, disclosing that it mined approximately 520 BTC in the quarter while selling 185 BTC. As of November 12, the company held 1,827 Bitcoins, with total liquidity reaching approximately $814 million, including approximately $637 million in cash in addition to uncollateralized and sold Bitcoins. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Analysts: Bitcoin price leads the M2 indicator; the DXY indicator is more suitable for assessing its correlation with Bitcoin.
data.description: Crypto analyst Willy Woo wrote, “The market doesn’t follow the expansion of global M2 supply; instead, it’s speculative. This means the market prices in anticipated liquidity in advance. Risk assets tend to lead M2. Therefore, at global peaks, you’ll see the S&P 500 peak earlier, and Bitcoin will peak even earlier. This is because Bitcoin acts as a liquidity-sensing mechanism. Furthermore, M2 is a flawed indicator because when you assess the total amount of fiat currency in the system, you’re measuring it in US dollars, but only about 17% is actually in US dollars; the rest is foreign currency. So M2 actually reflects more the strength of the US dollar. A more suitable indicator has proven to be the DXY (US Dollar Index), which is far more reliable when assessing its correlation with Bitcoin.”

data.title: Gates spot trading volume hit a new high of $163 billion in October, a 39.1% increase month-over-month.
data.description: Gate.com maintained its position as the world's second-largest spot exchange in October, with spot trading volume reaching $163 billion, a 39.1% increase month-over-month, setting a new record. Its global spot market share also rose to 6.04%, a 0.57 percentage point increase from the previous month, also a record high, second only to Binance (28.6%). Since the beginning of 2025, Gate.com's spot market share has increased by 3.43 percentage points year-to-date, making it the fastest-growing centralized exchange. In the derivatives market, global derivatives trading volume surged 25.8% to $7.56 trillion in October, a new high for the year; Gate.com maintained its fourth-largest global market share with a 10.5% market share. Meanwhile, Gate.com's global open interest accounted for 9.92%, further solidifying its leading position in the industry. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Disney (DIS) Beats Q4 EPS but Falls Short on Revenue
data.description:
Disney reported Q4 EPS of $1. 11 alongside $22. 5 billion in revenue, topping profit expectations but falling short on sales, with growth expected in 2026.
source: https://tokenist.com/disney-dis-beats-q4-eps-but-falls-short-on-revenue/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=disney-dis-beats-q4-eps-but-falls-short-on-revenue

data.title: Bitdeer Plans $400 Million Convertible Senior Notes Offering
data.description:
According to PANews, Bitdeer (Nasdaq: BTDR) has announced its intention to privately issue $400 million in Convertible Senior Notes due in 2031. The company is offering initial purchasers an option to increase the issuance by up to $60 million. The interest rate and initial conversion rate will be determined based on pricing, with conversion consideration available in cash, Class A common stock, or a combination of both.

The funds raised are intended for several purposes, including entering into capped call transactions with option counterparties to hedge dilution, repurchasing its 5.25% convertible bonds due in 2029, expanding data centers, developing and manufacturing ASIC mining machines, expanding HPC and AI cloud businesses, and providing operational capital.

Bitdeer is also advancing a registered direct offering to partially repurchase the 2029 convertible bonds, with the completion of related transactions being interdependent.

data.title: Ant Group Considers Extending Acquisition Deadline
data.description: According to Odaily, Hong Kong's Bright Smart Securities has announced that Ant Group, the acquisition offeror, is contemplating the possibility of extending the final deadline for their transaction. The deal requires approval from the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission and the National Development and Reform Commission. However, it is currently uncertain if all transaction conditions can be met by the November 25 deadline.

data.title: Bitdeer Plans $400 Million Fundraising Through Convertible Notes
data.description: According to Odaily, Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Bitdeer has announced its intention to raise $400 million through the issuance of convertible senior notes. The company also plans to grant initial purchasers of the notes an option to buy up to an additional $60 million within 13 days of the initial issuance. This could increase the total fundraising amount to $460 million. The new funds are intended for the expansion of data centers, development of ASIC mining machines, expansion of AI and HPC cloud business, and general corporate purposes.

data.title: Emory University Expands Bitcoin ETF Holdings Amid Market Shifts
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Emory University, a prominent private research institution in Georgia, has significantly increased its investment in Grayscale Investments' Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF. The university's holdings have surpassed one million shares, valued at approximately $51.8 million, as revealed in the quarterly Form 13F report submitted to the Securities and Exchange Commission. This marks a substantial increase from the second quarter of the year, with Emory doubling its position by acquiring an additional 487,636 shares worth around $25 million.

Emory University initially entered the Bitcoin ETF market in October 2024, becoming one of the first U.S. universities to disclose such holdings. At that time, it reported a $15 million stake in the Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF. The Mini Trust ETF, launched in July 2024 under the ticker symbol BTC, is a derivative of Grayscale's original Bitcoin Trust ETF (GBTC), which began trading in January 2024. The Mini Trust ETF is distinguished by its lower annual management fee of 0.15%, compared to the 1.5% fee of the original GBTC ETF. It was introduced through an initial seeding process that involved distributing 10% of GBTC's underlying Bitcoin.

In addition to its substantial investment in Grayscale's Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF, Emory University holds 4,450 shares of BlackRock's iShares Bitcoin ETF (IBIT), valued at approximately $290,000. This investment was disclosed in the second quarter, with no changes reported since then. Grayscale's Bitcoin ETFs have experienced significant investor outflows, losing over $21.3 billion in 2024, according to CoinShares data. Conversely, BlackRock's iShares Bitcoin ETFs have been a major contributor to Bitcoin ETF inflows, accounting for at least 80% of the total inflows last year, estimated at $48.7 billion.

In 2025, Grayscale's Bitcoin ETFs have continued to face challenges, with $2.5 billion in outflows, while BlackRock's iShares Bitcoin ETFs have attracted $37.4 billion in inflows, as per the latest CoinShares update. This trend highlights the shifting dynamics within the Bitcoin ETF market, with Emory University's strategic investments reflecting broader market movements and investor preferences.

data.title: Emory University increased its holdings in Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF to $51.8 million.
data.description: Emory University increased its holdings in the Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust to over 1 million shares, worth approximately $51.8 million, according to a quarterly 13F filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on Wednesday. Since the second quarter, the university has doubled its holdings in a Bitcoin ETF, adding 487,636 shares, worth approximately $25 million. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Ant Group may postpone its acquisition of Bright Smart Securities, a Hong Kong-based stablecoin concept stock.
data.description: Hong Kong-based Bright Smart Securities announced that Ant Group, the offeror for the acquisition, is considering extending the final deadline for the transaction. The deal reportedly requires approval from the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission and the National Development and Reform Commission, but it may not be possible to meet all transaction conditions before November 25th. (Caixin)

data.title: Bitdeer to raise $400 million through convertible senior notes offering
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Bitdeer announced it will raise $400 million through a convertible senior note offering. The company also plans to grant initial purchasers an option to purchase up to an additional $60 million of the notes within 13 days of the initial offering, meaning the company could raise up to $460 million. The new funds are intended for data center expansion, ASIC mining machine development, AI and HPC cloud business expansion, and general corporate purposes. (Globenewswire)
